programme.title: Mann
programme.desc: Dev and Priya meet on a cruise ship and fall head over heels in love. They decide to sort out their previous betrothals and careers, and meet six months later. However, when Priya does not keep her end of the bargain, Dev is left heartbroken.

programme.title: Mann
programme.desc: Dev and Priya meet on a cruise ship and fall head over heels in love. They decide to sort out their previous betrothals and careers, and meet six months later. However, when Priya does not keep her end of the bargain, Dev is left heartbroken.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Falak (The Sky)
programme.desc: A watchman Ramnath tries to stop his corrupt bosses from carrying out illegal business and gets killed, leaving behind his wife and two young boys. Years later, his sons decide to teach a good lesson to those responsible for Ramnath's murder.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.
